title: lippia schaueriana
intro: Lippia schaueriana, also known as Mexican oregano or Mexican marigold, is a perennial plant native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the Verbenaceae family. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to their antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The medicinal properties of Lippia schaueriana have been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems. Lippia schaueriana can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
